mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_refresh_token_session ( jti, user_id, expires_at, used, issued_at, used_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{jti}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt}, #{used}, #{issuedAt}, #{usedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), used = VALUES(used), issued_at = VALUES(issued_at), used_at = VALUES(used_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT jti, user_id, expires_at, used, issued_at, used_at, created_at, updated_at FROM t_refresh_token_session WHERE jti = #{jti} FOR UPDATE
